head.script: // imports("uiplugin._popup"); scwin.ozParamStr; scwin.initScreen = function() { var popupParam; if ($p.getPopupParam()) { pparam = JSON.parse($p.getPopupParam()); } else { pparam = JSON.parse($w.getPopupParam()); } var ozarg = {}; for (var i = 0;i < pparam.data.args.length; i++) { var argstr = pparam.data.args[i].split("="); ozarg[argstr[0]] = argstr[1]; } var option ={ ozrFile : pparam.data.ozrFile, odiFileName : pparam.data.odiFileName, args :ozarg }; if (pparam.data.child) { var ozchild = {}; for (var i = 0; i < pparam.data.child.length; i++) { ozchild[i] = { ozrFile :pparam.data.child[i].ozrFile, odiFileName: pparam.data.child[i].odiFileName, odiFileName: pparam.data.child[i].odiFileName }; ozchild[i].args = {}; if (pparam.data.child[i].args) { for (var j = 0; j < pparam.data.child[i].args.length; j++) { var argstr2 = pparam.data.child[i].args[j].split("="); ozchild[i].args[argstr2[0]] = argstr2[1]; } } } option.child = ozchild; } comLib.printOzViewer($p, option); };
